name: Foie Glasya de Nouvelles
name_jp: フォアグラシャ・ド・ヌーベルズ
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Recipe" card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target up to 3 cards in any GY(s); shuffle them into the Deck. When a card or effect is activated that targets a monster on the field, or when a monster is targeted for an attack (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 "Nouvelles" monster you control and 1 Attack Position monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 5 or 6 "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use each effect of "Foie Glasya de Nouvelles" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Recipe" card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target up to 3 cards in any GY(s); shuffle them into the Deck. When a card or effect is activated that targets a monster on the field, or when a monster is targeted for an attack (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 "Nouvelles" monster you control and 1 Attack Position monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 5 or 6 "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use each effect of "Foie Glasya de Nouvelles" once per turn.
